nasb.text: Though I walk in the midst of trouble, You will revive me; You will stretch forth Your hand against the wrath of my enemies, And Your right hand will save me.

esv.text: Though I walk in the midst of trouble, you preserve my life; you stretch out your hand against the wrath of my enemies, and your right hand delivers me.

cnv.text: 我雖然處身在患難之中，你仍使我存活； 我仇敵的怒氣，你必伸手抵擋； 你的右手必拯救我。

ccb.text: 耶和华啊，虽然我身陷患难， 你必保护我的性命， 伸手攻击恼怒的仇敌， 用右手拯救我。

csbs.text: 即使我行走在患难当中，你也能使我存活； 你出手对付我仇敌的怒气， 你的右手必拯救我。
